implementation-plan.reason: Plan names the hard-migration boundary, the exact sibling skills to merge, the execution layers to keep separate, downstream rewrite surfaces, and concrete stale-link/registry proof.

integration-readiness.reason: Blast radius is explicit across skills, registry, install symlinks, frontend media references, and Pi/Kimi bundles. The only caveat is that build execution must still prove no stale live symlinks remain.

evidence-quality.reason: The ticket defines command-level proof, stale-link search, registry count checks, and review artifact requirements before execution.

next_action: Approve TASK-0151 for build, then implement the video-production hard migration and run the declared validators.
